name: Kiko
imgalt: image of shiba in the sun, staring at the camera.
desc: A curious little explorer who loves sniffing out new adventures. Kiko is playful, alert, and always ready to turn anything into a game.

name: Sora
imgalt: small shiba sitting in the grass staring right at the camera
desc: Gentle and observant, Sora enjoys quiet moments just as much as zooming around the yard. A sweet pup with a calm, affectionate side.

name: Mochi
desc: Soft, squishy, and impossible to resist—Mochi is a cuddle expert with a playful streak. Loves belly rubs and being the center of attention.

name: Hoshi
imgalt: a cute shiba sitting obediently on the road whilst staring at the camera
desc: Bright and spirited, Hoshi shines wherever they go. This pup is energetic, confident, and full of personality.

name: Taro
imgalt: shiba baby with black fur in the grass staring at the camera
desc: A laid-back little companion who takes life one paw at a time. Taro is easygoing, friendly, and happiest by your side.

name: Yuki
imgalt: shiba pup with light fur sitting in the grass, staring at the camera
desc: Light on their feet and full of charm, Yuki is a graceful pup with a mischievous sparkle. Loves to play and keep you smiling.
